displayName: Entra JWT — Non-AI REST (Rate Limit + Quota)

parameters.name: ExpectedAudience
parameters.description: Expected aud claim in incoming Entra access tokens.

parameters.name: ContainerAppAudience
parameters.description: Audience/resource APIM uses when acquiring a managed identity token for the AI Policy Engine.

parameters.name: ContainerAppUrl
parameters.description: Base URL for the AI Policy Engine used by precheck and log-rest callbacks.

parameters.name: NonAiBackendUrl
parameters.description: Target REST backend host/FQDN routed through APIM.
